name: useUrlSearchParam
description: Hook that provides reactive URLSearchParams for a single key

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the url param

source.source: * @param {string} key The key of the url param

tokens.name: key

parameters.description: The options object with required initialValue

parameters.name: options.mode
parameters.description: The mode to use for the URL ('history' | 'hash-params' | 'hash')

parameters.name: options.write
parameters.description: The mode to use for writing to the URL
